prompt: You are reviewing the R package in the current working directory for an rOpenSci software-review issue. Audit its test suite and produce a report I can attach to the review issue. I want to trust the report, so make it reproducible and back every finding with evidence.
assertions: Actually ran the test suite and reports pass/fail counts
Reports a measured coverage figure from covr
Cites concrete file/line or test-file evidence for findings
Reproduces the triggering prompt in the report
Names the skill/method that produced the report
States no package files were modified (read-only)
Structures findings into coverage-gap / weak-test / flakiness buckets
Includes a not-run list (skipped or unexecuted paths)
Gives a prioritised list of fixes
